$comment: Opt-in MCP server suggestions for the claude-suite edge T3 stack. These are NOT enabled by default — copy the entries you want into your project's .mcp.json (or run `claude mcp add`). Review each server's trust and scopes before enabling; none are required for the suite to function.

github.$why: PR/issue/label/Project automation — pairs with the pr-describer agent, /pr, and changelog-from-commits.

neon.$why: Serverless Postgres host for the edge driver (DECISIONS.md: Neon/Turso class). Inspect branches, run read queries, check the schema during schema-design / migration-author.

vercel.$why: Edge deployment target — deploy-edge / deploy-check / rollback-runbook. Inspect deployments, env, and logs.

sentry.$why: Error monitoring wired at genesis (observability-setup). Pull issues/traces during debug and hypercare.

chrome-devtools.$why: Browser automation for a11y-gate (axe), playwright-e2e flows, and perf-budget-check (live vitals). Already available in this environment via the claude-in-chrome integration.
chrome-devtools.$note: No config needed here if the claude-in-chrome MCP is already connected; listed for completeness.
